checkin.journal:
Anniversary with cosita, was quite 17 years…. like this is a lot one could even argue that this was too long, feeling painful in my boniko, had pains and aches when sittin on the plane for 2 hours, crazy bad… 2 hours with easy jet is no bueno for sure, otherwise day went by well and we traveled smoothly
Bloating 3/10 was actually surprisingly low all considering

But the sitting pain was pretty big when in bed i felt it right on right spot and when sitting on left side. Its all connected so yeah
